title: Doctor Visit
opening: Hello, please sit down. How can I help you today?

t1.prompt: Hello, please sit down. How can I help you today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello, please sit down. How can I help you today? - Hello, please sit down. How can I help you today?

t2_general.prompt: I see. Can you tell me more about what you are feeling?
t2_general.promptTranslation: I see. Can you tell me more about what you are feeling? - I see. Can you tell me more about what you are feeling?

t2_stomach.prompt: I see. How long have you had the stomach pain? Do you feel sick to your stomach or vomit?
t2_stomach.promptTranslation: I see. How long have you had the stomach pain? Do you feel sick to your stomach or vomit? - I see. How long have you had the stomach pain? Do you feel sick to your stomach or vomit?

t2_head.prompt: How long have you had this headache? Is it very strong? Do you feel dizzy?
t2_head.promptTranslation: How long have you had this headache? Is it very strong? Do you feel dizzy? - How long have you had this headache? Is it very strong? Do you feel dizzy?

t2_cold.prompt: Do you have a fever or a sore throat with your cold? Are you very tired?
t2_cold.promptTranslation: Do you have a fever or a sore throat with your cold? Are you very tired? - Do you have a fever or a sore throat with your cold? Are you very tired?

t3_prescription.prompt: Okay, I will give you some medicine. Take it three times a day. Drink water and rest.
t3_prescription.promptTranslation: Okay, I will give you some medicine. Take it three times a day. Drink water and rest. - Okay, I will give you some medicine. Take it three times a day. Drink water and rest.

t3_checkup.prompt: It sounds a bit serious. We need to do some tests to find the cause. Can you come back tomorrow morning?
t3_checkup.promptTranslation: It sounds a bit serious. We need to do some tests to find the cause. Can you come back tomorrow morning? - It sounds a bit serious. We need to do some tests to find the cause. Can you come back tomorrow morning?

t3_allergies.prompt: Do you have any allergies to medicine, like penicillin or aspirin?
t3_allergies.promptTranslation: Do you have any allergies to medicine, like penicillin or aspirin? - Do you have any allergies to medicine, like penicillin or aspirin?

t4_followup.prompt: Good. If you feel worse, please call us. Take care and goodbye!
t4_followup.promptTranslation: Good. If you feel worse, please call us. Take care and goodbye! - Good. If you feel worse, please call us. Take care and goodbye!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you say that again, please?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you say that again, please? - Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you say that again, please?
